note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.The company list could not be loaded (HT: The company list could not be loaded (HTTP % (code) s).
et_back.Minted %(address)s — documents emailed t: Minted % (address) — documents sent by email to that land in its inbox.
et_back.Address revoked — it stops routing on th: Address cancelled — it will stop routing at the next postal survey.
et_back.Address not found (or email-in is not av: The address has not been found (or an email is not available).
et_back.“%(filename)s” is already in the inbox —: "% (filename) s" is already in the inbox — shows the existing document.
Missing document version — please try again.
et_back.Version conflict — refresh and try again: Version conflict — update and try again.
The company is obliged to publish.
et_back.Publish already in progress — retry in a: Publish already in progress — try again in a second.

et_back.AI extraction is not enabled on this edi: artificial intelligence extraction is not allowed on this edition — key document manually.
et_back.Document is not in a re-extractable stat: The document is not in the retractable state.
The document can no longer be rejected.

et_back.The reconciliation data could not be loa: Reconciliation data could not be loaded (HTTP % (code) s).
et_back.The accounting engine could not be reach: The accounting engine was not reached — nothing was exchanged. Try again in a moment.
et_back.Auto-match complete — %(n)s line(s) matc: Automatic game complete — % (n) s line (s) matched.
et_back.The report could not be loaded (HTTP %(c: The report could not be loaded (HTTP % (code) s).
There are no age balances to show.
et_back.No budget set for this month — create on: This month's budget is not scheduled — create one based on the budget.
et_back.The group overview compares every compan: The group review compares each of your tenant's businesses side by side when the multi-company is enabled.
et_back.The group overview becomes useful once a: The Group Review becomes useful when another company exists.
et_back.Companies report in different currencies: Companies report in different currencies — subtotals are shown per currency rather than translated.
et_back.%(n)s more company(ies) not shown — the: % (n) s more company (ies) did not show — overview fans field to the first % (max) s.

ru_back.The company list could not be loaded (HT: The list of companies could not be loaded (HTTP% (code) s).
ru_back.Minted %(address)s — documents emailed t: Printed% (address) s are documents sent there by e-mail in this mailbox.
ru_back.Address revoked — it stops routing on th: The address's cancelled — he's canceling the next mail interview.
ru_back.“%(filename)s” is already in the inbox —: "% (filename) s" is already in the mailbox, showing the existing document.
Missing version of the document, please check.
ru_back.Version conflict — refresh and try again: The conflict of theories is to refresh and try again.
ru_back.Publish already in progress — retry in a: Publish the ones that are in the process — retrieve in a second.
ru_back.Published as DRAFT %(kind)s — source doc: Published as document DRAFT% (kind) s — the original document is attached.

There's no salesman's name to make contact.
ru_back.The reconciliation data could not be loa: Reconciliation data could not be downloaded (HTTP% (code) s).
ru_back.The accounting engine could not be reach: The accounting engine has not been achieved — nothing has changed. Try again in a minute.
ru_back.Auto-match complete — %(n)s line(s) matc: The automatic match is complete — line% (n) s (s) coincides.
ru_back.The report could not be loaded (HTTP %(c: The report could not be loaded (HTTP% (code) s).
ru_back.No budget set for this month — create on: There is no budget provision for this month to create one budget.
ru_back.The group overview compares every compan: The group review compares all the companies in your rental company next door as soon as it is possible to create a multinational company.
ru_back.The group overview becomes useful once a: An overview of the group becomes useful after the establishment of the second company.
ru_back.Companies report in different currencies: Companies provide data in different currencies — intermediate amounts are shown by currency rather than by transfer.
ru_back.%(n)s more company(ies) not shown — the: "% (n) s" is not shown more than the company (services) — the viewing fans are shown for the first "% (max) s".
